programme.title: Thief, (1981, Crime)
programme.desc: Michael Mann directs this stylishly photographed action-packed drama that stars James Caan as a master safe cracker who is planning his last heist for the sake of a woman (Tuesday Weld).

programme.title: Marlowe, (2023, Crime)
programme.desc: Marlowe, a gripping thriller set in 1939 LA. Hard-boiled private eye, Philip Marlowe, is hired to find the lover of a glamorous heiress. Unexpectedly, Marlowe finds himself embroiled in a deadly mystery that he's determined to either solve or die trying.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty, (2006, Drama)
programme.desc: In the late 1980s, a low level gangster named Jackie DiNorscio defends himself in court in what became the longest criminal trial in American judicial history.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: An adventure of a millionaire playboy who steals a priceless work of art and then strikes up a fiery romance with the brilliant female insurance investigator who is on to his game.

programme.title: A Simple Plan, (1998, Crime)
programme.desc: In a gym bag. That's how three men size up what they've found in the snowy Minnesota woods. They've come across a downed plane with a rotting corpse inside...and over $4 million stuffed inside a duffel bag. Finders, keepers? Maybe.

programme.title: Suicide Kings, (1998, Thriller)
programme.desc: A group of youngsters kidnap a respected Mafia figure.

programme.title: King of New York, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: A Simple Plan, (1998, Crime)
programme.desc: In a gym bag. That's how three men size up what they've found in the snowy Minnesota woods. They've come across a downed plane with a rotting corpse inside...and over $4 million stuffed inside a duffel bag. Finders, keepers? Maybe.

programme.title: Dark Places, (2015, Thriller)
programme.desc: A woman who survived the brutal killing of her family as a child is forced to confront the events of that day with the help of a secret society obsessed with solving notorious crimes.

programme.title: 20th Century Women, (2017, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: A strong-willed single mother (Annette Bening) raises her teenage son with the help of two unconventional younger women (Elle Fanning, Greta Gerwig) in this look at a makeshift family's comic adventures in Santa Barbara during the summer of 1979.

programme.title: C'mon C'mon, (2021, Drama)
programme.desc: Johnny and his young nephew forge a tenuous but transformational relationship when they are unexpectedly thrown together in this delicate and deeply moving story about the connections between adults and children, the past and the future.

programme.title: Minari, (2021, Drama)
programme.desc: A tender and sweeping story about what roots us, Minari follows a Korean-American family that moves to an Arkansas farm in search of their own American Dream.

programme.title: Close, (2023, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Leo and Remi are two thirteen-year-old best friends whose seemingly unbreakable bond is suddenly, tragically torn apart in this emotionally transformative and unforgettable portrait of the intersection of friendship and love.

programme.title: God's Creatures, (2022, Thriller)
programme.desc: A mother tells a lie for her beloved son that rips apart their family and close-knit Irish town— ultimately testing her own sense of right and wrong in this tense, atmospheric thriller.

programme.title: Outlaws, (2019, Action)
programme.desc: When a motorcycle gang leader is released from prison, he must fight his former deputy for control of his turf in an epic clash of gang warfare and personal rivalry in this action-packed biker thriller.

programme.title: Son of a Gun, (2015, Action)
programme.desc: JR, a teenage criminal, is locked up for a minor crime and forced to adapt to the harsh realities of prison life. Brendan Lynch (Ewan McGregor), one of Australia's most notorious criminals, offers JR protection, but it comes with a price.

programme.title: The Getaway, (1994, Crime)
programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Bound, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Striking Distance, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: Coming from a police family, Tom Hardy ends up fighting his uncle after the murder of his father. Tom believes the killer is another cop and goes on the record with his allegations. Demoted then to river duty, the killer taunts Tom.

programme.title: Bound, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Point Break, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers.

programme.title: The First Wives Club, (1996, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Join the Club - The First Wives Club, the good-time battle-of-the-sexes satire sparked by snappy one-liners, great physical-comedy gags and three unforgettable stars in top form, Bette Midler, Goldie Hawn and Diane Keaton.

programme.title: Mrs. Winterbourne, (1996, Romance)
programme.desc: This fast-paced comedy follows the story of eighteen-year-old Connie Doyle an expectant mother with no money and an uncertain future.

programme.title: Hammer, (1972, Action)
programme.desc: Fred Williamson stars a boxer on the rise who is asked to throw a fight by the local mob that has figured prominently in his success. His moral dilemma hits close to home when the life of his girlfriend (Vonetta McGee) is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Across 110th Street, (1972, Action)
programme.desc: Anthony Quinn and Anthony Franciosa portray New York cops in this fierce thriller about a deadly robbery investigation on the mean streets of Harlem.

programme.title: North Dallas Forty, (1979, Comedy)
programme.desc: In a society in which major league sporting events have replaced Sunday worship as the religion of choice, North Dallas Forty appears like a desecration at the altar.

programme.title: The End, (1978, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: When Sonny (Burt Reynolds) is diagnosed with a fatal disease, he swallows a bottle of pills to end it all! Instead, he ends up in a loony bin beside the demented Marlon (Dom DeLuise) who is eager to help Sonny succeed...one madcap attempt at a time!

programme.title: Bugsy Malone, (1976, Musical)
programme.desc: Set in 1929 New York City, Bugsy Malone captures a flashy world of would-be hoodlums, showgirls, and dreamers - all played by child actors!

programme.title: Last Of The Red Hot Lovers, (1972, Romance)
programme.desc: A middle-aged restaurant owner heart yearns for one memorable affair. After securing a key to his mother's apartment, he is free to seek an afternoon fling. But he fumbles his way through three beautiful women who have something else on their minds.

programme.title: Goin' South, (1978, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: JACK NICHOLSON plays Henry Moon, a third-rate outlaw, in this romantic comedy set in the 1860s.

programme.title: Cold Turkey, (1971, Comedy)
programme.desc: Dick Van Dyke stars as Clayton Brooks, minister in a small Iowa town, who takes up the challenge presented by an ad exec (Bob Newhart) for a tobacco company: any city or town in America that can give up smoking for 30 days gets $25 million dollars.

programme.title: Up in Smoke, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Adventures of Artimus Stanleyus
programme.desc: Shark gets hooked into a battle with the Barians when the President of the Comic Book Appreciation Club challenges him to a duel! Can Shark outdraw the competition, or will his Number and life points be erased?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Doom in Bloom
programme.desc: Shark’s sister Rio makes a big splash on her first day at school, but not all the attention she gets is good, especially when she catches the eye of a Barian botanist!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Rivals in the Ring
programme.desc: A new Barian threat arrives on the scene looking to take Yuma’s Numbers, but his plan gets tripped up when he falls head over heels for Tori!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Friendship Games
programme.desc: When Yuma’s buddies can’t stop bickering, it’s time for them to face-off in the Friendship Games, a sports dueling competition with surprises around every corner… including Barians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sphere Cube Calamity: Part 1
programme.desc: A dangerous new Barian enemy arrives, and he’s bringing one of his world’s most powerful weapons to take down Yuma and Astral!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sphere Cube Calamity: Part 2
programme.desc: Mizar batters Yuma to his breaking point… until a surprise duelist steps in to take down Mizar and go claw-to-claw with his Galaxy-Eyes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Playing Defense
programme.desc: In order to set Yuma straight, Shark steals Yuma’s Key! Can Yuma find the courage to face Shark, or will Yuma’s fears leave him cowering for cover?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Counter Offensive: Part 1
programme.desc: Let’s get ready to duuuuuuuuel! Yuma steps into the ring with Alito, but can he dodge this Barian’s Battlin’ Boxers before they send him to the canvas for a ten count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Counter Offensive: Part 2
programme.desc: It’s Round 2 of the heavyweight battle between Yuma and Alito! Can Yuma bob and weave his way around Alito’s attacks, or will this Barian’s fancy footwork finish him off for good?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Dual Duel: Part 1
programme.desc: Girag’s got revenge on his mind and Ray in his sights, but when Yuma steps in to save the day, the Ray Way steers Yuma off course!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Dual Duel: Part 2
programme.desc: Girag has Yuma and Ray in the palm of his hand, but will a secret that Ray has been keeping help our heroes escape the clutches of this Barian behemoth?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Darkness Dawns
programme.desc: Astral and Yuma face a challenge so daunting that they must turn to their biggest adversary for help!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: You Give Love A Bot Name
programme.desc: When Orbital 7 crashes into Lillybot, it’s love at first sensor! So when he discovers his beloved bot is in trouble, he motors to free her from her tormentor… Yuma!
programme.sub-title: You Give Love A Bot Name

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Take a Chance
programme.desc: Shark’s trying to control Rio’s life and she’s not taking it anymore! Will this family feud turn into a feeding frenzy for Shark, or will Rio put her brother’s winning streak on ice?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: An Imperfect Couple: Part 1
programme.desc: The gang’s dressed up as their favorite monsters for the school’s fun fair, but when Anna crashes the festivities, the party ends for Yuma!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: An Imperfect Couple: Part 2
programme.desc: Being Anna’s boyfriend is a dangerous job, but when Anna’s teacher plays a Barian card, Yuma finds out just how dangerous it is!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Enter Vector
programme.desc: Yuma is confronted by an enemy from the past who casts a dark shadow on his future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Search for Shadows
programme.desc: Yuma embarks on a dangerous mission to rescue Ray from the evil clutches of Vector!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Shadows of Deception
programme.desc: The Barians are on the attack, and Yuma is ready to risk everything to rescue Ray! But when Vector reveals a terrifying truth, Yuma's dream of saving Ray turns into a nightmare!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sinister Shadows
programme.desc: Still reeling from Vector’s revelation that he and Ray Shadows are one and the same, Yuma looks to make Vector pay for all his lies! But with Astral learning of Yuma’s own deceptions, will Yuma have to face Vector alone?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Shadows End
programme.desc: All the cards are on the table! Can our heroes defeat the dark and dangerous Barians, or will they end up one card short?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Duel in Ruins: Part 1
programme.desc: An ancient Barian deity awakens to add a terrifying new twist to Barian World’s agenda against Astral!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Duel in Ruins: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma is put to the ultimate test when a Number Guardian traps his friends and forces him to battle for their freedom!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Dark Mist Rises: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma searches for the second Mythyrian Number and ends up finding an old nemesis who is out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Dark Mist Rises: Part 2
programme.desc: Every time Astral attacks, he puts Yuma’s life in danger, but if he doesn’t attack, he’s a goner himself! It’s a no-win situation in the cruelest duel yet!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Barian Vengeance: Part 1
programme.desc: Alito’s back in the ring to take down Yuma, but a fair fight isn’t in the cards when Alito has one of Yuma’s friends in his corner!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Barian Vengeance: Part 2
programme.desc: Nistro’s under Alito’s control, and it’s up to Yuma and Dextra to free him! Can this tag team duo bob and weave their way past Alito’s attacks, or will this Barian knock out any chances they have of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Put to the Test: Part 1
programme.desc: The hunt for the Mythyrian Numbers leads our heroes to the peak of a perilous mountain where Kite’s skills are put to the test by a dragon-wielding Number Guardian!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Put to the Test: Part 2
programme.desc: Kite faces his toughest challenge ever when a powerful Number Guardian threatens to take possession of his Galaxy-Eyes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Furry Fury
programme.desc: After an ancient statue is unearthed, Yuma finds himself between a rock and a furry place when he discovers that there’s more to Girag than meets the eye – like a red nose and whiskers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Sea of Troubles: Part 1
programme.desc: It’s rough waters ahead for Yuma and his friends when the search for the last two Mythyrian Numbers leads them to an ancient ruin that lies beneath the bottom of the ocean!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Sea of Troubles: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle beneath the ocean reaches new depths of danger when Shark comes face to face with the Number Guardian, Abyss!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A World of Chaos: Part 1
programme.desc: Earth and Astral World are under attack! Yuma and Astral are the only ones who can stop it, but saving their planets may come at the ultimate price…

programme.title: Eneru strikes Angel Island with a devastating lightning bolt, and Luffy continues his heroic climb up the giant beanstalk. The rubber-man refuses to stop until he rings the golden bell – no matter what the cost!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Angel island obliterated! The horror of the raigo's advent!

programme.title: While Eneru continues his thunderous barrage, Nami hatches a plan to give Luffy one more shot at a grudge match with god. Zoro’s at the center of the scheme, but he might not survive his mission!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Knock over giant jack! Last hope for escape!

programme.title: Nami’s quick thinking gets Luffy closer to god, and the Straw Hat captain launches himself into the center of a sinister storm! Can he find a way to destroy Eneru’s looming cloud of death?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Miracle on skypiea! The love song heard in the clouds!

programme.title: In the aftermath of Luffy’s epic battle with Eneru, sunny skies chase away the storms, and the cloud-dwelling citizens of Angel Island turn their attention to rebuilding their homeland.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The battle ends! Proud fantasia echoes far!

programme.title: Robin attempts to decipher the riddle of a mysterious poneglyph, Usopp barters with the locals, and Luffy raids the priceless treasures of the legendary city of gold!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I made it here! The yarn the poneglyphs spin!

programme.title: With a little help from their new friends – and a giant octopus – the Straw Hats bid farewell to Skypiea and begin their descent back to the deep blue sea. Where they’ll land is anyone’s guess!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Off to the blue sea! A heartfelt finale!

programme.title: After a frightening fall from the clouds, the Straw Hats find themselves trapped inside an impenetrable Marine stronghold. The crew gets separated, the Going Merry is impounded, and rumors of ghosts run rampant!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A state of emergency is issued! A notorious pirate ship has infiltrated!

programme.title: While Nami searches for the Going Merry, Luffy and Sanji pose as famous chefs, only to end up competing in a cooking contest with a beautiful mistress of the galley!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sanji the cook! Proving his merit at the marine dining hall!

programme.title: Zoro is imprisoned and interrogated, and Chopper’s ill-chosen hiding spot lands him in the operating room along with a doctor who can’t stand the sight of blood!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy’s insatiable appetite betrays his true identity, and yet another member of his crew ends up in the brig when two Straw Hats try to fool Commander Jonathan with the same disguise!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The marine's dragnet closes in! The second member captured!

programme.title: Commander Jonathan sets a Straw Hat trap, but Luffy and Sanji are willing to risk it all to help spring their mates. Will a souvenir from the sky save the day – or will their escape plan be scuttled by foul play?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy and sanji's daring rescue mission!

programme.title: Luffy and his gang make a break for the docks, and Commander Jonathan deploys armed guards in an attempt to slow down the Straw Hats. Only one thing is certain: somebody is going down for the count!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Enter the hot-blooded special forces! Battle on the bridge!

programme.title: The Straw Hats are surrounded, outnumbered, blasted with tear gas. Taking a pretty, young doctor hostage may be their only hope for surviving long enough for a Merry reunion!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Breaking through the seige! The going merry is recovered!

programme.title: Luffy and his crew were almost in the clear when Nami made a horrifying discovery: the Marines stole their gold! Now, the Straw Hats must sail straight into the thick of the fight to reclaim their lost riches!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The pirate ship disappears! Fortress battle, round #2!

programme.title: Usopp hatches a plan for a moonlit raid on the Marine vault, but Commander Jonathan is has a nasty surprise waiting for the pirates! Meanwhile, Sanji and Nami attempt to recover the waver.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The gold and waver recovery operations!

programme.title: The extreme arrogance of a Marine special investigator clears a path for Luffy and company to make their escape! Unfortunately, the Straw Hats still have to find their gold before returning to the high seas!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The one fell swoop plan! Jonathan's surefire secret tactic!

programme.title: The Straw Hats may think they’re in the clear, but Commander Jonathan has one final trap waiting to ground the Going Merry! If Luffy’s crew is to escape, they’ll need a helping hand – or eight!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Farewell, marine fortress! The last battle for escape!

programme.title: Luffy and his mates survive and near-death encounter with some mischievous sea monkeys only to land on a mysterious island where everything is much longer than it should be!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Great adventure at long ring long land!

programme.title: After a loyal horse and his recently-returned master are assaulted by thugs, Luffy is drawn into a Davy Back Fight with the Foxy Pirates. The Straw Hat captain never backs down from a challenge, but this contest could cost him his crew!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A davy back with the foxy pirates!

programme.title: The Davy Back Fight begins with a treacherous Donut Race around Ling Ring Long Land! The Straw Hats square off against the Foxy Pirates in a battle to see who loses a crew member!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Round 1! One lap of the donut race!

programme.title: Nami uses her considerable skill as a navigator to put the Straw Hats on the verge of victory, but the captain of the Foxy Pirates has more than a few dirty tricks up his sleeve!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Silver fox foxy! The merciless interference!

programme.title: Thanks to some foxy sabotage, Chopper has been lost to the enemy. The only hope for getting him back lies with Zoro and Sanji, but can they learn to work together in time to save the little reindeer?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Round 2! Shoot it into the groggy ring!

programme.title: Sanji and Zoro take a beating at the hands of the Groggy Monsters, but they won’t give up the fight. With a little luck – and some teamwork – they’ll emerge victorious from round two of the Davy Back Fight!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A barrage of red cards in groggy ring!

programme.title: Round three of the Davy Back Fight is a rip roaring roller derby! Chopper’s fate still hangs in the balance, and the Straw Hats have a huge problem: Luffy doesn’t know how to skate!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: As the Davy Back Fight sprints toward a sensational finish, the Straw Hats find themselves on the brink of defeat! Luffy’s finally managed to stay on his skates, but the Foxy Pirates are notorious cheaters!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A seriously heated race! Into the final round!

programme.title: The Straw Hats somehow manage to defeat the Foxy Pirates and win back Chopper, but Luffy eagerly accepts the challenge of a rematch! What is the captain thinking? And will his crew mutiny?
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: A devious game of dodge ball costs the Straw Hats their archaeologist. Now, they’ll have to win an unusual uphill race to reclaim Robin and avoid losing another crew member!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Showdown on the cliff! Red light, green light!

programme.title: Robin and Chopper have both been lost to the Foxy Pirates, and there’s only one match remaining in the Davy Back Fight! Luffy’s got a plan to get his mates back, but failure would mean the end of the Straw Hats forever!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The captains square off! The final combat round!

programme.title: Luffy and Captain Foxy go toe-to-toe in a brutal battle waged aboard a booby-trapped boat. Luffy is fighting for his crew, but Captain Foxy’s dirty tricks have him on the ropes!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Full-blast slow-slow onslaught vs. Invulnerable luffy

programme.title: Luffy’s epic battle with Captain Foxy reaches its riveting end, and a very old man with a very tall horse reunites with a face from very long ago.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Epic, heated combat! The fateful final conclusion

programme.title: When Luffy and his mates lose their memory, Robin is the only Straw Hat who can remember their adventures together. Can she recover their recollections before the crew splits up?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Was it lost? Stolen? Who are you?

programme.title: Robin tries to hold the crew together while unraveling the mystery of the missing memories. Meanwhile, Nami and Zoro flashback to painful moments from their pasts.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A mysterious boy with a horn and robin's deduction!

programme.title: The Straw Hats finally discover the culprit behind their memory loss, but they’ve got bigger problems. The mysterious thief is determined to pit Zoro and Luffy against each other!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Now, let's get back our memories! The pirate crew lands on the island!

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell, (1995, Anime)
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Science fiction)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Source Code, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jake Gyllenhaal stars in this action thriller about a man who awakens in another man’s body to discover only he has the ability to stop a terrorist attack on a commuter train.

programme.title: Supernova, (2000, Science fiction)
programme.desc: "Supernova" chronicles the search and rescue patrol of a deep space medical ship and its six-member crew.

programme.title: The Lazarus Effect, (2015, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: A group of medical researchers discover a way to bring dead patients back to life.

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Science fiction)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Riders Of The Whistling Pines, (1949, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry believes he has accidentally shot a man, but learns that the guilt lies with men trying to stop a destructive moth infestation. Will modern chemicals be used to save the day, against Gene?

programme.title: Rim Of The Canyon, (1949, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry, playing a dual role as his father and himself, is stranded by thieves who are searching for a stolen $30,000. A schoolteacher aids Gene with his search for the outlaws and the treasure.

programme.title: The Misfits, (1961, Western)
programme.desc: In their final screen performances, Clark Gable and Marilyn Monroe are at their luminous best as an aging cowboy and a disillusioned divorcee, each trying to adapt to new ways of life in John Huston's piercing classic. Montgomery Clift also stars.

programme.title: God Forgives, I Don't, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: A fast-shooting gunman and an insurance agent track down the murdering robbers of a train hijacking and the stolen money.

programme.title: Vera Cruz, (1954, Western)
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: The Kentuckian, (1955, Western)
programme.desc: Eli Wakefield (Burt Lancaster) and his son are Kentucky adventurers longing for life on the Texas frontier. They learn, however, that their greatest challenge lies not in the uncharted wilderness, but in the people they meet along the way.

programme.title: The Way West, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: War Of The Wildcats, (1943, Western)
programme.desc: A confident oil baron and a determined cowboy are rivals for Oklahoma land and oil rights, and for the love of a pretty schoolteacher. The cowboy acts on behalf of the Indians, on whose land the oil is discovered.

programme.title: In Old California, (1942, Western)
programme.desc: The Duke plays a young, ambitious pharmacist who moves into a brawling frontier town but locks horns with a local crime lord, bent on keeping the town for himself.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days, (2003, Romance)
programme.desc: A "How to..." columnist agrees to write a first-hand account about what it takes to drive a man out of your life... in exactly 10 days.

programme.title: The Mexican, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: A man tries to transport an ancient gun called The Mexican, believed to carry a curse, back across the border, while his girlfriend pressures him to give up his criminal ways.

programme.title: Up in the Air, (2009, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Ryan (George Clooney) flies all over for work, but after meeting a passenger he learns that life isn't about the journey, but the connections we make along the way.

programme.desc: A "How to..." columnist agrees to write a first-hand account about what it takes to drive a man out of your life... in exactly 10 days.

programme.title: The Illusionist, (2019, Thriller)
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Vienna, a magician uses his abilities to secure the love of a woman far above his social standing.

programme.title: Home of the Brave, (2006, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The story of four American soldiers nearing the end of their tours of duty in Iraq.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa and Usagi befriend a young painter named Kamoi at the park. Kamoi is visited by Cere-Cere, who asks the man to paint a portrait of her.
programme.sub-title: Don't Lose Sight of Your Dreams: The Mirror of Truth

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa is curious to know why Pegasus is reluctant to tell her where he came from. When she confronts Pegasus with the question, he disappears.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Palla-Pall turns Sailor Chibi Moon into an adult and Sailor Moon into a child. Chibi-Usa turns into shock when Pegasus can no longer hear her.
programme.sub-title: Pegasus's Secret: The Boy Who Protects the Dream World

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls begin to suspect that Chibi-Usa is in love. Eager to know who the boy is, they try to get Chibi-Usa to talk, but with little success.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends help set up the stage for the Coming of Age Day ceremony. They befriend four girls who are actually the Amazoness Quartet.
programme.sub-title: Dream to be an Adult: The Amazoness' Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Strange spider webs begin to appear all across the Juban District. The girls notice that these webs are all originating from the Dead Moon Circus.
programme.sub-title: Terror in Motion: The Dark Queen's Evil Hand

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia sets her plan in motion by starting a solar eclipse that will leave the world in eternal darkness.
programme.sub-title: The Source of Darkness: Dead Moon Circus

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dead Moon discovers that Sailor Chibi Moon was hiding Pegasus and captures her. Sailor Chibi Moon learns the history behind the Dead Moon's queen.
programme.sub-title: Labyrinth of Mirrors: Chibi Moon Captured

programme.desc: Nehelenia demands that Helios give up the Golden Crystal in exchange for Sailor Chibi Moon. The Sailor Guardians are struggling to defeat Zirconia.

programme.desc: Nehelenia regains her full power and proceeds to put the world into an eternal slumber.Sailor Moon tries to activate the power of the Golden Crystal.

programme.desc: The Golden Crystal’s power defeats Nehelenia, pushing her back into the abyss. Nehelenia tries to take Sailor Chibi Moon with her.
programme.sub-title: Dreams Forever: Fill the Heavens with Light

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends start their new lives as high school girls. Nehalennia breaks out of her prison to seek revenge against the Sailor Guardians.
programme.sub-title: The Flower of Nightmares Scatters: The Queen of Darkness Returns

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Hotaru starts to age at an accelerated rate, from a baby to a young girl within days. She warns of coming danger that will soon befall Sailor Moon.
programme.sub-title: Saturn Awakens: The Ten Sailor Guardians Unite

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The city is being plagued by a strange illness that causes people to become obsessed with staring into the mirror for hours, even days.
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Mirror: Mamoru Caught in a Nightmare

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon is left devastated after seeing Mamoru get abducted To make matters worse, Nehalennia’s action is starting to cause a time paradox.
programme.sub-title: Night of Destiny: The Sailor Guardians' Ordeals

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon runs off to save Mamoru from Nehalennia. The rest of the Sailor Guardians try to go after her, but they fall victim to Nehalennia’s traps.

O general romano Lucius lidera uma legião de mil soldados no país e com o comandante do protetorado das Regiões Ocidentais, Huo An, ele luta para derrotar o assassino Tiberius e restaurar a soberania da China. programme.title: Pequenos Espiões 4, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Marisa Cortez Wilson é casada com Wilbur, um repórter conhecido por desmascarar espiões, e com ele tem um bebê e duas crianças. O que o marido não sabe é que a esposa é uma ex-espiã, que decidiu largar a carreira para se dedicar à família. programme.desc: 2017. Há muitos anos, o Monte Huaguo foi destruído pelo Reino Celestial, a morada dos deuses da mitologia chinesa, deixando Sun Wu Kong, o Rei Macaco, furioso, já que o local era seu lar. Kong está decidido a confrontar aqueles que determinaram seu destino. programme.title: O Mito, (2005)
programme.desc: 2005. O arqueólogo Jack continua tendo sonhos recorrentes de uma vida passada, onde ele é o grande general Meng Yi, que jurou proteger uma princesa chamada Ok-Soo. Jack decide ir investigar tudo com seu amigo William. programme.title: Deus da guerra, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. Na dinastia Ming, onde o jovem general Qi Jiguang conquista uma importante vitória contra os piratas japoneses, comandando o exército chinês. Quando, quatro anos depois, sua nação é mais uma vez atacada, Qi se vê obrigado a retornar aos campos de batalha. programme.desc: 2014. Na Europa da Idade Média, os reinos da Inglaterra e da França estão a beira da guerra. O rei inglês, Henrique II, já com a idade avançada e a saúde já debilitada, prepara o seu sucessor, um de seus filhos, para governar e levar o reino a vitória. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Malcolm McDowell, Greg Maness, Burton Perez Diretor: Stefano Milla

programme.title: Encontrando o Amor em Sugarcreek, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Pai e filho fugindo de uma tragédia chocante e brutal se instalam na cidade predominantemente amish de Sugarcreek, Ohio. Eles são acolhidos por três irmãs que oferecem ao pai um trabalho de faz-tudo, mas uma policial local começa a desconfiar. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Paixão Fatal, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um professor universitário alcoólatra em recuperação, tentando recompor sua vida, conhece uma nova aluna sedutora. Ela oferece a ele uma fuga sensual da realidade até que ele perceba que ela pode estar louca. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Um Encontro com o Destino, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Margaret dirige uma agência de arquitetos em pleno crescimento. Ela recebe subitamente duas notícias: sua prima e grande amiga Susan morreu em um acidente de carro com o marido. No testamento, Susan e Hank deixam a guarda para ela. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Entre o Amor e a Fama, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma estrela de reality show sai de Hollywood e parte em direção a Amish Country, onde ela deve decidir entre viver sua nova realidade ou voltar para a antiga. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Sem Controle, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jack trabalha como matador de aluguel, mas sua vida solitária é alterada por dois estranhos: uma cantora e um cientista. Jack e a moça se apaixonam, mas à medida que seu relacionamento fica mais forte, ele fica fisicamente mais fraco e doente. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Siga Seu Coração, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após deixar a comunidade Amish, Kathy Yoder torna-se uma escritora de guias de viagem. Porém, forçada a voltar e resolver assuntos deixados pelo pai, ela relembra o que é fazer parte de uma comunidade. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Bela e a Fera, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Pessoas de um vilarejo estão sendo brutalmente assassinadas e a Fera é acusada de ser a responsável pelas mortes. Acreditando em sua inocência, Bela e Fera se juntam para descobrir e combater o responsável pelos crimes. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Uma Longa Queda, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quatro estranhos planejam saltar juntos do mesmo edifício na véspera do Ano Novo. Eles formam uma espécie de família problemática e decidem que têm seis semanas para encontrar razões legítimas para continuar vivos. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Infidelidade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma viagem de final de semana se transforma em um pesadelo quando um casal adúltero é obrigado a participar de um jogo doentio de sobrevivência com seu sequestrador. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Casamento dos Meus Sonhos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher solitária se apaixona por um pediatra que está prestes a se casar em uma das cerimônias que ela está organizando. Gêneros: Drama

programme.desc: 1970. O Garoto-Formiga entra em sua adolescência e pensa em se aposentar, mas muda de ideia quando seu arqui-inimigo é libertado da prisão. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma História Americana, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A violência do preconceito racial causa um boicote aos transportes por parte da comunidade negra nos anos 1950. Uma aristocrata decide, por conveniência, ajudar sua empregada, mas seu marido a proíbe. Essa imposição faz com que as duas se unam. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Homem de Família, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um corretor de investimentos, a quem foi oferecida a oportunidade de ver como seria sua vida paralela, acorda e descobre que seu carro esportivo e a namorada se tornaram uma minivan e sua esposa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Tuff Turf - O Rebelde, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Prestes a terminar o ensino médio, Morgan é obrigado a mudar seu estilo de vida ao trocar de escola. Lá, ele acaba se envolvendo com a namorada do líder de uma gangue. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sem Rastros, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois que uma menina desaparece de um parque de trailers, o pai e a mãe da garota decidem fazer justiça com as próprias mãos. A busca desesperada dos pais pela verdade acaba levando a uma revelação chocante. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Porto Seguro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher misteriosa se muda para uma pequena cidade e recomeça sua vida. Apesar da moça estar determinada a não formar laços afetivos na nova cidade, ela não consegue cumprir esse objetivo e acaba levantando questionamentos sobre seu passado. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 2003. Após a enorme quantidade de mortos em acidentes de trânsito envolvendo idosos no volante, a geração mais jovem de South Park decide tirar as licenças de conduzir de todos eles. Porém, nenhum deles ficará de braços cruzados. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T07E10

programme.title: 2003. Kyle diz que, como presente de aniversário, sua mãe levará ele e três amigos para a Casa Bonita. A alegria de Cartman acaba quando Kyle decide convidar Stan, Kenny e Butters. Agora Butters precisa "desaparecer". Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T07E11

programme.title: 2003. Um novo aluno mórmon se muda à South Park, mas não se dá bem com ninguém. Os rapazes querem que Stan comece uma briga com ele, mas na verdade, ele acaba se tornando seu amigo. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Adrien Beard, Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T07E12

programme.title: 2003. Wendy termina o seu relacionamento com Stan, e para ajudá-lo, os meninos o levam a um restaurante famoso por suas asas de frango e suas belas garçonetes. Mas o plano não funciona e Stan se une a um grupo de góticos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Nico Agnone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T07E14

programme.title: 2003. Os pais biológicos de Ike o levam ao Canadá graças a uma nova lei que aprovou o primeiro ministro e toda South Park decide dar dinheiro para eles dos presentes de Natal para que os Broflovskis se recuperem. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Spencer Lacey Ganus, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T07E15

programme.title: 2004. Após comprar armas de artes marciais do velho oriente em um mercado de pulgas, os rapazes se transformam em ninjas. Butters se sente rechaçado pelo grupo quando eles não o deixam brincar com as armas e se transforma em Professor Caos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E01

programme.title: 2004. Cartman se fantasia de um robô chamado "Genial-O 4000" e Butters acredita que ele de fato é um robô. Porém, a piada de Cartman se transforma em um pesadelo quando ele descobre que Butters tem um vídeo dele fantasiado de Britney Spears. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E02

programme.title: 2004. Jimmy e Timmy treinam para participar das Olimpíadas Especiais de Denver. Enquanto isso, Cartman se disfarça para convencer um comitê qualificado de que ele é deficiente e assim pode participar e ganhar o prêmio. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E03

programme.title: 2004. Cartman convence Kyle para assistir "A Paixão", o novo filme de Mel Gibson, que segundo Cartman, é o verdadeiro motivo pelo qual o mundo odeia os judeus. Kyle assiste o filme em seguida se desculpa com Cartman. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E04

programme.title: 2004. Cartman, Stan, Kyle e Kenny estão na deles quando aparece um grupo de jovens bailarinos de breakdance que os desafia para uma competição de dança. Stan, que decide montar uma equipe com os melhores dançarinos para poder ganhar deles. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E05

programme.title: 2004. Humanos do ano 3045 estão chegando em South Park através de um portal do tempo para buscar trabalho. Quando os rapazes conseguem fazer um dinheirinho extra, os imigrantes do tempo roubam os trabalhos deles. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E06

programme.title: 2004. O senhor Michael Jack... Jefferson está morando em South Park. Enquanto os rapazes curtem a casa cheia de jogos e animais, a polícia fica contrariada pelo fato de ter que lidar com um negro rico e querem incriminá-lo de qualquer maneira. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E07

programme.title: 2004. Os protetores dos animais se manifestam contra o uso de uma vaca como mascote da escola, e os estudantes se veem forçados a buscarem uma nova mascote, o que gera um conflito entre Cartman e Kyle, já que ambos tem ideias diferetes. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E08

programme.title: 2004. South Park está emocionada pela inauguração de uma sucursal do Wall-Mart na cidade. Logo todos aproveitam sua enorme variedade de produtos e ofertas, e deixam de comprar nos negócios locais, levando-os à falência. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E09

programme.title: 2004. Os rapazes guardaram um segredo durante cinco anos sobre um incidente ilegal que cometeram na pré-escola, pelo qual Trent Boyett foi parar em um reformatório. Mas agora, Boyett está em liberdade e com sede de vingança. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E10

programme.title: 2004. Cartman, Jimmy, Kyle, Stan, Butters e Token produzem suas próprias notícias matinais na estação de televisão interna da escola e ficam praticamente presos em uma intensa competição por conseguir a maior quantidade de audiência. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E11

programme.title: 2004. Paris Hilton visita South Park para inaugurar sua loja "Tonta, puta e mimada" e, ao ver que ela é um modelo para uma enorme quantidade de garotas, Wendy se preocupa muito. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: Kit de Vídeo da Vadia Idiota e Mimada
programme.desc: South Park - T08E12

programme.title: 2004. Cartman estava tentando voar, mas o máximo que conseguiu foi um golpe na cabeça e isso fez com que ele ficasse dois dias em coma. A polícia local assume que agora Cartman tem poderes psíquicos e que pode resolver casos extraordinários. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E13

programme.title: 2004. Stan se encontra com alguns lindos animaizinhos do bosque, que pedem para ele alguns favores inocentes. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E14

programme.title: 2005. Após passar por uma operação para mudar de sexo, o senhor Garrison finalmente se sente como uma verdadeira mulher. Enquanto isso, Kyle quer fazer uma cirurgia para ficar negro e assim, conseguir ser aceito pelo time de basquete. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: A Nova Vagina Chique do Professor Garrison

programme.title: 2005. South Park é invadida por hippies e seu festival de música ameaça destruir a cidade. Cartman tenta eliminar todos eles, tratando-os como se fossem pragas. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T09E02

programme.title: 2005. Os meninos se dão conta que podem conseguir os 10% de lucro que outra pessoa receba, apenas por serem seus agentes. Assim, eles resolvem representar Wing, uma menina chinesa cantora que está sendo buscada pela máfia do seu país. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T09E03

programme.title: 2005. Kenny consegue o último videogame portátil da cidade. programme.desc: South Park - T09E04

programme.title: 2005. Nenhum dos rapazes das Vacas de South Park gosta de jogar beisebol e sempre fazem o possível para perder, para que não precisem seguir avançando até as finais. O problema é que todas as outras equipes estão fazendo a mesma coisa. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker

programme.title: 2020. Naruto pede a Tsunade curar Sasuke e Lee antes dela se tornar no Hokage. Após examinar Lee, ela diz a ele que encontre outro caminho que não seja de um shinobi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Aviso De Tsunade: Ninja Nunca Mais!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Aviso De Tsunade: Ninja Nunca Mais! - T01E98

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade pergunta a Lee se ele quer desistir do caminho de um ninja ou ter uma cirurgia arriscada, com apenas 50% de chance de ser bem-sucedida. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Vontade De Fogo Ainda Queima!
programme.desc: Naruto: A Vontade De Fogo Ainda Queima! - T01E99

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade aconselha a Lee que desista do caminho de um shinobi, e Lee relembra do seu primeiro encontro com seu professor, Guy. Incapaz de dominar nenhum ninjutsu ou genjutsu, Lee sempre foi desprezado pelos outros. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sensei E O Aluno: O Laço Dos Shinobi!
programme.desc: Naruto: Sensei E O Aluno: O Laço Dos Shinobi! - T01E100

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe sempre quiseram ver o rosto por trás da máscara de Kakashi. Os três fazem de tudo para ver. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Você Precisa Ver! Você Precisa Conhecer! O Verdadeiro Rosto Do Kakashi Sensei!
programme.desc: Naruto: Você Precisa Ver! Você Precisa Conhecer! O Verdadeiro Rosto Do Kakashi Sensei! - T01E101

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura recebem uma missão B e vão para a região vizinha, a Terra do Chá. Eles devem proteger os corredores numa corrida, que acontece a cada quatro anos durante o ritual cerimonial do Santuário Todoroki. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Missão: Ajudar Um Velho Amigo Na Terra Do Chá!
programme.desc: Naruto: Missão: Ajudar Um Velho Amigo Na Terra Do Chá! - T01E102

programme.title: 2020. Os chefes da aldeia acreditam que Idate criou uma farsa do grande festival tradicional. Jirocho acredita que Idate fugiu com um plano em mente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Corrida Começou !Problemas Em Alto-Mar ! - T01E103

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e a equipe conseguem alcançar Idate, que está ferido e inconsciente, perto de Aoi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Corre, Idate, Corre ... A Ilha Nagi O Aguarda !
programme.desc: Naruto: Corre, Idate, Corre ... A Ilha Nagi O Aguarda ! - T01E104

programme.title: 2020. Mesmo com a interferência de Aoi, Idate não para de correr. Idate não confia em ninguém ainda, e é revelado que durante a Prova Chunin, o irmão mais velho de Idate foi o examinador quem fez a décima pergunta. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Batalha Feroz Do Trovão Retumbante
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Batalha Feroz Do Trovão Retumbante - T01E105

programme.title: Naruto: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia - T01E04
programme.sub-title: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia
programme.desc: 2020. Com a equipe formada, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura conhecem seu sensei, o enigmático Kakashi. Ele propõe um desafio que apenas dois deles podem vencer - quem falhar voltará para a Academia Ninja! Mas eles não sabem que Kakashi nunca deixou ninguém vencer! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi - T01E05
programme.sub-title: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi
programme.desc: 2020. Com o iminente risco de falhar, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura fazem de tudo para passar no árduo teste de sobrevivência. Mas esses ninjas egoístas precisarão escutar as palavras sábias de Kakashi para aprenderem sobre trabalho em equipe! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas - T01E06
programme.sub-title: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe começam suas primeiras missões de ninja cumprindo tarefas entediantes e básicas. Cansado e com fome, Naruto desabafa com o Hokage que, entretido, propõe uma nova missão: proteger um velho rabugento chamado Tazuna até a casa dele! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Camelia Vermelha - T02E106
programme.desc: 2009. Para proteger guren da raivosa três caudas, yukimaru usa poderes além de seus limites. Comovida pela gesto dele, guren lamenta pelo seu pecado no passado de ter matado a mãe de yukimaru Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.sub-title: O caminho iluminado pela lua cheia

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E41

programme.title: Naruto: O Assassino Da Névoa - T01E07
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe chegam ao País das Ondas, onde o perverso negociante chamado Gato controla a terra. Gato contrata Zabuza Momochi para matar Tazuna. Animado, Naruto não vê a hora de enfrentar esse poderoso ninja assassino. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: O Juramento De Dor - T01E08
programme.desc: 2020. Kakashi está em vantagem na batalha contra Zabuza, mas a situação se reverte quando Kakashi é preso na Prisão de Água de Zabuza! Kakashi insisite para que a equipe fuja, mas Naruto lembra da promessa que fez de nunca mais fugir e decide ficar!! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Kakashi, O Guerreiro Sharingan - T01E09
programme.desc: 2020. Graças ao plano de Naruto, Kakashi escapa da Prisão de Água. Zabuza é derrotado e ferido, mas de repente um misterioso ninja rastreador aparece e mata Zabuza. Naruto se espanta ao ver um garoto não muito mais velho que ele derrotar Zabuza tão facilmente. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Contra Ataque Da Marca Da Maldição - T02E109
programme.sub-title: O Contra Ataque Da Marca Da Maldição
programme.desc: 2009. Apesar da tentativa de salvamento, naruto e guren não retornam. A frustração aumenta entre o grupo, mas quando a besta de três caudas desperta de seu sono, a equipe de selamento faz uma segunda tentativa com a barreira de selamento de quatro pontas. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Promessa Quebrada - T02E111

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Últimas Palavras - T02E80
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi fica chocada ao saber que a missão verdadeira de Sai é matar Sasuke. Sai alcança Sasuke - deve matá-lo ou salvá-lo? Sai e Sasuke se enfrentam, demolindo uma parte do esconderijo. Naruto e os outros encontram Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Notícias Tristes - T02E81
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi tem seu desejo atendido ao reencontrar Sasuke, mas Sasuke não mudou. Seu objetivo é se vingar de seu irmão mais velho, Itachi. Os impulsos da Raposa de Nove Caudas incitam Naruto, mas Sasuke usa seu sharingan para suprimir a raposa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Equipe Dez - T02E82
programme.desc: 2008. O desejo de Sasuke por vingança continua firme. Naruto fica chateado quando percebe que fracassou mais uma vez em levar Sasuke para casa. Orochimaru tem mais ou menos seis meses até sua transferência. A equipe Kakashi faz uma nova promessa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Alvo Na Mira! - T02E83
programme.desc: 2008. Kakashi e a equipe dez partem para deter o akatsuki. Tsunade considera a equipe dez de naruto com o respaldo ideal para a equipe dez e manda naruto aperfeiçoar seu novo jutsu em 24 horas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Habilidades De Kakuzu - T02E84
programme.desc: 2008. Shikamaru e choji dão os primeiros golpes na batalha, mas estão contrariados com o poder de kakuzu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Terrível Segredo - T02E85
programme.desc: 2008. Shikamaru e seus companheiros desesperadamente contra-atacam a ofensiva do jutsu de fogo. Mas usar continuamente rasengan e a espada relâmpago causa desgaste em kakashi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Gênio Shikamaru - T02E86
programme.desc: 2008. Shikamaru enfrenta hidan sozinho, no fundo da floresta e após gastar todo seu chakra, ele tem um ferimento profundo. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Quando Se Amaldiçoa Alguém, Cava-Se O Próprio Túmulo! - T02E87
programme.sub-title: Quando Se Amaldiçoa Alguém, Cava-Se O Próprio Túmulo!
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto e a equipe kakashi chegam na hora certa para ajudar a equipe asuma. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Estilo Vento: Rasen Shuriken! - T02E88
programme.desc: 2008. Ino e choji ficam pasmos com novo jutsu de naruto, e kakuzu sente o perigo se aproximando. Mas ao lançá-lo, o novo jutsu se dissipa antes de atingir kakuzu. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Preço Do Poder - T02E89
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto usa seu novo jutsu para derrotar kakuzu. programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness. Starring Ron Perlman, John Hurt, Selma Blair.

programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works in a hidden, high-security government laboratory. Starring Sally Hawkins, Michael Shannon, Richard Jenkins.

programme.title: Splice
programme.desc: An experiment goes horribly wrong when two scientists (Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley) use human DNA to create a hybrid creature. Starring Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley, Delphine Chaneac.

programme.title: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Mort discovers he has less than a year to live. After his fiance leaves him, he meets Kate on a dating service that matches people by their death dates, all while being stalked by a crazy pimp. Starring Keir Gilchrist, Lucy Hale, Francesca Eastwood.

programme.title: Barbarian
programme.desc: A young woman discovers the rental home she booked is already occupied by a stranger. programme.desc: As the U.S. Army tries to restore order, a carrier of rage virus enters London and reinfects the populace. Starring Robert Carlyle, Rose Byrne, Jeremy Renner.

programme.desc: A mischievous squirrel and his sidekick assemble a ragtag animal crew to get inside their towns nut shop and steal enough food for the winter. Starring Will Arnett, Brendan Fraser, Liam Neeson.

programme.desc: Surly the squirrel and his animal pals find out that the corrupt mayor of Oakton plans to bulldoze their beloved park. Hoping to save the place they call home, the gang joins forces with a cute mouse who happens to be a fierce master of kung fu. Starring Will Arnett, Katherine Heigl, Maya Rudolph.

programme.title: The Boxtrolls
programme.desc: A boy (Isaac Hempstead-Wright) and his new friend (Elle Fanning) hatch a plan to save a community of mischievous cavern-dwellers from the villainous townsman (Ben Kingsley) who plans to exterminate them. Starring Isaac Hempstead-Wright, Elle Fanning, Ben Kingsley.

programme.title: Gnomeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Love-struck garden gnomes (James McAvoy, Emily Blunt) become part of a feud between rival neighbors in Stratford-Upon-Avon, Shakespeares birthplace. Starring James McAvoy, Emily Blunt, Michael Caine.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: The archer and his Moorish companion join Sherwood Forest outlaws to fight against the sheriff of Nottingham, who desires to possess Maid Marian. Starring Kevin Costner, Morgan Freeman, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy. Starring Dustin Hoffman, Robin Williams, Julia Roberts.

programme.title: Finding Neverland
programme.desc: Writer J.M. Barrie (Johnny Depp) befriends a widow (Kate Winslet) and her four sons who inspire him to create the character Peter Pan. Starring Johnny Depp, Kate Winslet, Julie Christie.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: Accidentally separated from his family as a child, Saroo Brierley returns to India 25 years later to find them. Starring Dev Patel, Rooney Mara, David Wenham.

programme.desc: After the death of Red Jacob, a new Laird of Clan MacKenzie must be chosen and both of his sons, Colum and Dougal, vie for the title; at the Gathering, Brian Fraser and Ellen MacKenzie meet and are struck by their strong connection.

programme.title: The Other Boleyn Girl
programme.desc: Family ambition pits British sisters Anne (Natalie Portman) and Mary (Scarlett Johansson) Boleyn against each other for the affections of King Henry VIII. Starring Natalie Portman, Scarlett Johansson, Eric Bana.

programme.title: Incendies
programme.desc: A womans last request sends her twin children to the Middle East to find their roots. Starring Lubna Azabal, Melissa Desormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette.

programme.desc: A high-end art thief becomes trapped inside a luxury, high-tech penthouse in New Yorks Times Square after his heist doesnt go as planned. programme.title: Lemonade
programme.desc: A young Romanian woman moves to the United States with her son after she marries an American man she hardly knows. Starring Malina Manovici, Dylan Smith, Steve Bacic.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henrys double date goes awry when Magnus insists they do a routine delivery of an Abnormal en route.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and Tesla investigate a former Praxian stronghold and realize they may have stumbled upon secrets to the Vampiris race.

programme.desc: An engaged couple adopts two puppies. When they decide to split up, the puppies hatch a plan to bring the two back together. Starring Sara Fletcher, Rib Hillis, Corin Nemec.

programme.desc: A ghoul-whispering youngster (Kodi Smit-McPhee) battles zombies, ghosts, witches and ignorant adults to save his town from an ancient curse. Starring Kodi Smit-McPhee, Tucker Albrizzi, Anna Kendrick.

programme.title: Weathering With You
programme.desc: A boy runs away to Tokyo and befriends a girl who appears to be able to manipulate the weather. Starring Brandon Engman, Ashley Boettcher, Alison Brie.

Starring Cierra Ramirez, Angelique Rivera, Gregg Sulkin.

programme.title: Escape From Planet Earth

programme.title: Deep

programme.title: Where the Wild Things Are

programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, four women (Melissa McCarthy, Kristen Wiig, Leslie Jones, Kate McKinnon) prepare for an epic battle as mischievous ghosts start to wreak havoc in New York. Starring Melissa McCarthy, Kristen Wiig, Leslie Jones.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Grieving writer Gia decides to write a book about womens desire; she interviews entrepreneur Sloane, homemaker Lina and student Maggie as they overturn their lives.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Lina flees from a stagnant marriage and a body of pain; she joins a womens group at Doctor Henrys, tries to reconnect with the love of her life, and begins a friendship with Gia.

programme.title: Edge of Winter
programme.desc: Stranded at a remote cabin in the wintertime, two siblings (Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White) must fight for survival as their increasingly unhinged father (Joel Kinnaman) loses his grip on reality. Starring Joel Kinnaman, Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: A socially awkward teen decides to import a mail-order best friend from France. Instead, he ends up with his personal nightmare: a cologne-soaked, chain-smoking, sex-obsessed youth who quickly becomes the hero of the community. Starring Ed Oxenbould, Avan Jogia, Justin Hartley.

programme.title: Tom at the Farm
programme.desc: A young man (Xavier Dolan) travels to an isolated farm for his lovers funeral where hes quickly drawn into a twisted, sexually charged game by his lovers aggressive brother (Pierre-Yves Cardinal). Starring Xavier Dolan, Pierre-Yves Cardinal, Lise Roy.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: In June 1944, members of The Five are recruited for a mission to Normandy, ahead of the landings; the Reich is using a powerful abnormal to power a weapon and the Allies cant land until the weapon is neutralized.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A colleague vanishes amid unexplained disappearances in Normandy, France; Magnus and her team run into a military blockade during their investigation.

programme.desc: A dashing rooster and the hen he loves lead an escape from a farm in 1950s England. Starring Mel Gibson, Julia Sawalha, Miranda Richardson.

programme.desc: A girl and her friends set off on a journey to find a magic potion that will help a prince whos trapped in a mouses body. Starring Geri Courtney-Austein, Ashley Bornancin, Tony Azzolino.

programme.desc: An upper-class lawyer (Daniel Day-Lewis) falls in love with his fiancees (Winona Ryder) freethinking cousin (Michelle Pfeiffer) in the 1870s New York. Starring Daniel Day-Lewis, Michelle Pfeiffer, Winona Ryder.

programme.title: The Theory of Everything
programme.desc: During the 1960s, Cambridge University student and future physicist Stephen Hawking (Eddie Redmayne) falls in love with fellow student Jane Wilde (Felicity Jones). programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences. Starring Cate Blanchett, Rooney Mara, Sarah Paulson.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: A difficult visit from her mother propels Sloane further toward Will; Richard attempts to appease Sloanes desire in a different, ill-fated way.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Maggie summons the courage to tell her parents and the police about the relationship with her high school teacher.

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: Blood begins to spill soon after the daughter (Allie MacDonald) of a Broadway diva wins the lead in the summer showcase at a performing-arts camp. Starring Allie MacDonald, Douglas Smith, Minnie Driver.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: A man (James Spader) and wife who get thrills from car accidents hook up with the head (Elias Koteas) of a group that stages famous wrecks. Starring James Spader, Holly Hunter, Elias Koteas.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: A lone frontiersman (James Stewart) risks his life to forge peace between Arizona settlers and Cochises (Jeff Chandler) Apache nation. Starring James Stewart, Jeff Chandler, Debra Paget.

programme.desc: An ex-gunfighter (Alan Ladd) sides with Wyoming homesteaders (Jean Arthur, Van Heflin) against a ruthless cattle baron. Starring Alan Ladd, Jean Arthur, Van Heflin.

programme.desc: An Indian scout attempts to escort a homesteaders wife and her son back to safety after her husband deserts her during an Apache attack. When she refuses to go, he stays on to help and, over time, forms a strong bond with both her and her son. Starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond.

programme.title: McCabe and Mrs. Miller
programme.desc: A frontier gambler (Warren Beatty) and a madam (Julie Christie) protect their booming business from outside investors. Starring Warren Beatty, Julie Christie, Rene Auberjonois.

programme.title: The Wild Bunch
programme.desc: An outlaw (William Holden) and his gang, on the run from the Mexican Army and bounty hunters, plot to rob a United States Army train. Starring William Holden, Ernest Borgnine, Robert Ryan.

programme.title: Billy the Kid
programme.desc: The Wild West outlaw (Robert Taylor) rides into town and faces a childhood friend turned territorial marshal (Brian Donlevy). Starring Robert Taylor, Brian Donlevy, Ian Hunter.

programme.title: Hollywood Canteen
programme.desc: A GI (Robert Hutton) back from the South Pacific wins a canteen raffle and meets his dream girl (Joan Leslie), as Warner Bros. stars perform. Starring Robert Hutton, Joan Leslie, Dane Clark.

programme.title: Flying Down to Rio
programme.desc: A bandleader (Gene Raymond) woos a Latin flame (Dolores del Río) who is already engaged to his employer. The film features the first screen pairing of Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers. Starring Dolores del Río, Gene Raymond, Raul Roulien.

programme.title: Born to Dance
programme.desc: A tap-dancing understudy (Eleanor Powell) meets a sailor (James Stewart) on leave and replaces the star (Virginia Bruce) of a show. Starring Eleanor Powell, James Stewart, Virginia Bruce.

programme.title: Swing Time
programme.desc: Gambler/dancer Lucky (Fred Astaire) falls for dance teacher Penny (Ginger Rogers) while engaged to Margaret. Starring Fred Astaire, Ginger Rogers, Victor Moore.

programme.title: Royal Wedding
programme.desc: A brother (Fred Astaire) and sister (Jane Powell) take their act to 1947 London. Includes Astaires famous dance on the ceiling. Starring Fred Astaire, Jane Powell, Peter Lawford.

programme.title: The Band Wagon
programme.desc: Two playwrights bring a movie dancer (Fred Astaire) to New York for a Broadway show with a ballerina (Cyd Charisse). Starring Fred Astaire, Cyd Charisse, Oscar Levant.

programme.title: Seven Brides for Seven Brothers
programme.desc: When an Oregon trapper decides to marry, his six rowdy brothers aim to follow suit, though not one has a sweetheart yet. Starring Howard Keel, Jane Powell, Russ Tamblyn.

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of vicious gang warfare between the New Yorker Jets and the Puerto Rican Sharks, a romance develops across rival lines. 1960s update of "Romeo and Juliet", with amazing song and dance sequences. Starring Natalie Wood, Richard Beymer, Russ Tamblyn.

programme.title: All That Jazz
programme.desc: A Broadway choreographer (Roy Scheider) chain-smokes, pops pills and overworks his way to open-heart surgery. Starring Roy Scheider, Jessica Lange, Ann Reinking.

programme.title: The Red Shoes
programme.desc: A ballerina (Moira Shearer) loves a ballet composer (Marius Goring) but dances for an obsessive impresario (Anton Walbrook). Starring Moira Shearer, Anton Walbrook, Marius Goring.

programme.title: Fame
programme.desc: Leroy, Coco (Irene Cara), Bruno (Lee Curreri) and others of mixed talents and means attend New Yorks High School of Performing Arts. Starring Irene Cara, Eddie Barth, Lee Curreri.

programme.title: Algiers
programme.desc: A Paris thief who is hiding in the Casbah meets a woman who reminds him of home. Starring Charles Boyer, Hedy Lamarr, Sigrid Gurie.

programme.title: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Belfast police conduct a door-to-door manhunt for an IRA gunman (James Mason) wounded in a daring robbery. Starring James Mason, Robert Newton, Kathleen Ryan.

programme.title: Logans Run
programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely. Starring Michael York, Jenny Agutter, Richard Jordan.

programme.title: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Two former 60s radicals (Christine Lahti, Judd Hirsch) live underground with their sons, one of whom (River Phoenix) wants to stop running. Starring Christine Lahti, River Phoenix, Judd Hirsch.

programme.title: I Am a Fugitive From a Chain Gang
programme.desc: An innocent man is sent to a prison farm, where he endures the dehumanizing effects of a cruel criminal justice system. Starring Paul Muni, Glenda Farrell, Helen Vinson.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: Two men (Tony Curtis, Sidney Poitier) of different races, who hate each other, escape from a chain gang shackled together. Starring Tony Curtis, Sidney Poitier, Theodore Bikel.

programme.title: North by Northwest
programme.desc: Mistaken identity spurs a foreign spy (James Mason) to pursue an innocent New Yorker (Cary Grant), all the way to Mount Rushmore. Starring Cary Grant, Eva Marie Saint, James Mason.

programme.title: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: A fight promoter (Rod Steiger) hires a hard-luck sportswriter (Humphrey Bogart) to hype a simple Argentine boxer for the mob. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Rod Steiger, Jan Sterling.

programme.title: Fat City
programme.desc: A young fighter (Jeff Bridges) inspires a boozing ex-boxer (Stacy Keach) working as a fruit picker to try a comeback. Starring Stacy Keach, Jeff Bridges, Susan Tyrrell.

programme.title: Champion
programme.desc: A boxer (Kirk Douglas) uses women, mobsters and his disabled brother (Arthur Kennedy) to get the middleweight title. Starring Kirk Douglas, Marilyn Maxwell, Arthur Kennedy.

programme.title: Golden Boy
programme.desc: A violinist (William Holden) turns boxer, egged on by his managers (Adolphe Menjou) girlfriend (Barbara Stanwyck). Starring Barbara Stanwyck, Adolphe Menjou, William Holden.

programme.title: Somebody Up There Likes Me
programme.desc: A youth turns his rebellious nature into a successful ring career in this fact-based portrait of boxer Rocky Graziano. Starring Paul Newman, Pier Angeli, Everett Sloane.

programme.title: Mr. Dodd Takes the Air
programme.desc: A mans life is changed when he breaks into radio as a singer, but must undergo an operation that changes his voice. Starring Kenny Baker, Alice Brady, Jane Wyman.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent
programme.desc: A political assassination plunges an American reporter into international intrigue in pre-World War II Europe. Starring Joel McCrea, Laraine Day, Herbert Marshall.

programme.title: Its Always Fair Weather
programme.desc: A talk-show staffer (Cyd Charisse) puts a fight manager (Gene Kelly), adman (Dan Dailey) and cook on TV 10 years after they parted as GIs. Starring Gene Kelly, Dan Dailey, Cyd Charisse.

programme.desc: When a man arrives from Chicago claiming to be Bryanas father, Bernie is cautiously supportive.

programme.desc: When Bernie agrees to participate in a celebrity marathon, Vanessa declares that she will finish the race ahead of him.

programme.title: Move When The Spirit Says Move: The Legacy of Dorothy Foreman Cotton
programme.desc: Exploring the work of a bold yet unsung civil rights activist and educator and those carrying on her legacy.

programme.title: Playing Sam
